### 3. `components/BlocklyComponent.tsx`
Updated to define new blocks (`kru_drill`, `kru_water`, `kru_shoot`, `kru_forever`, `kru_if_obstacle`, `kru_if_else_obstacle`) and generate compatible code for the Simulation Engine.

```tsx
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

declare const Blockly: any;

interface BlocklyComponentProps {
  initialXml: string;
  toolbox: string;
  onCodeChange: (code: string) => void;
  onBlockCountChange?: (count: number) => void;
}

const BlocklyComponent: React.FC<BlocklyComponentProps> = ({ initialXml, toolbox, onCodeChange, onBlockCountChange }) => {
  const blocklyDiv = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const workspaceRef = useRef<any>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!blocklyDiv.current) return;
    if (typeof Blockly === 'undefined') return;

    // Define Blocks
    const defineBlock = (type: string, json: any, gen: (block: any) => string) => {
        if (!Blockly.Blocks[type]) {
            Blockly.Blocks[type] = { init: function() { this.jsonInit(json); } };
            if (Blockly.JavaScript) Blockly.JavaScript[type] = gen;
        }
    };

    defineBlock('kru_start', {
        "type": "kru_start", "message0": "🚩 เริ่มทำงาน", "nextStatement": null, "colour": 160
    }, () => '');

    defineBlock('kru_move', {
        "type": "kru_move", "message0": "เดินหน้า %1 1 ช่อง", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "➡️", "class": "block-icon-large"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 260
    }, () => `api.move();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_turn_left', {
        "type": "kru_turn_left", "message0": "เลี้ยวซ้าย %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "↩️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 210
    }, () => `api.turnLeft();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_turn_right', {
        "type": "kru_turn_right", "message0": "เลี้ยวขวา %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "↪️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 210
    }, () => `api.turnRight();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_collect', {
        "type": "kru_collect", "message0": "เติมน้ำมัน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "⛽"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 20
    }, () => `api.collect();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_drill', {
        "type": "kru_drill", "message0": "เจาะหิน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "⛏️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 60
    }, () => `api.drill();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_water', {
        "type": "kru_water", "message0": "รดน้ำ %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "💧"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 200
    }, () => `api.water();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_shoot', {
        "type": "kru_shoot", "message0": "ยิงปืน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "🔫"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 0
    }, () => `api.shoot();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_loop', {
        "type": "kru_loop", "message0": "🔄 ทำซ้ำ %1 ครั้ง %2 %3", "args0": [{"type": "field_number", "name": "TIMES", "value": 3}, {"type": "input_dummy"}, {"type": "input_statement", "name": "DO"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 120
    }, (block: any) => {
        const repeats = block.getFieldValue('TIMES');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        return `for (var i = 0; i < ${repeats}; i++) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_forever', {
        "type": "kru_forever", "message0": "♾️ วนซ้ำตลอด %1 %2", "args0": [{"type": "input_dummy"}, {"type": "input_statement", "name": "DO"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 290
    }, (block: any) => {
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        // In our simulation, we limit steps, so a simple loop works
        return `for (var k = 0; k < 50; k++) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_if_obstacle', {
        "type": "kru_if_obstacle", 
        "message0": "❓ ถ้าเจอ %1 ให้ทำ %2 %3", 
        "args0": [
            { "type": "field_dropdown", "name": "OBSTACLE", "options": [["หิน 🪨", "ROCK"], ["ไฟ 🔥", "FIRE"], ["เอเลี่ยน 👾", "ALIEN"]] }, 
            { "type": "input_dummy" }, 
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "DO" }
        ], 
        "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 45
    }, (block: any) => {
        const obs = block.getFieldValue('OBSTACLE');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        return `if (api.check('${obs}')) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_if_else_obstacle', {
        "type": "kru_if_else_obstacle", 
        "message0": "❓ ถ้าเจอ %1 ให้ทำ %2 %3 นอกเหนือจากนี้ %4", 
        "args0": [
            { "type": "field_dropdown", "name": "OBSTACLE", "options": [["หิน 🪨", "ROCK"], ["ไฟ 🔥", "FIRE"], ["เอเลี่ยน 👾", "ALIEN"]] }, 
            { "type": "input_dummy" }, 
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "DO" },
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "ELSE" }
        ], 
        "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 45
    }, (block: any) => {
        const obs = block.getFieldValue('OBSTACLE');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        const elseBranch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'ELSE');
        return `if (api.check('${obs}')) {\n${branch}} else {\n${elseBranch}}\n`;
    });


    // Initialize Workspace
    try {
        workspaceRef.current = Blockly.inject(blocklyDiv.current, {
            toolbox: toolbox,
            scrollbars: false,
            trashcan: true,
            sounds: true,
            zoom: { controls: true, startScale: 1.3, maxScale: 3, minScale: 0.5 }
        });

        const xmlStr = initialXml || '<xml><block type="kru_start" x="50" y="50"></block></xml>';
        if (Blockly.Xml?.domToWorkspace) {
            Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.utils.xml.textToDom(xmlStr), workspaceRef.current);
        }

        workspaceRef.current.addChangeListener(() => {
            if (Blockly.JavaScript) {
                try {
                    const code = Blockly.JavaScript.workspaceToCode(workspaceRef.current);
                    onCodeChange(code);
                    if (onBlockCountChange) onBlockCountChange(workspaceRef.current.getAllBlocks(false).length);
                } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
            }
        });

    } catch (e) { console.error("Init Error", e); }

    const handleResize = () => Blockly.svgResize(workspaceRef.current);
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
    return () => {
        window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
        if (workspaceRef.current) workspaceRef.current.dispose();
    };
  }, [toolbox]); // Re-init when toolbox changes

  return <div className="w-full h-full relative font-bold"><div ref={blocklyDiv} className="absolute inset-0" /></div>;
};

export default BlocklyComponent;
```

### 4. `components/Stage.tsx`
Updated to render Rocks, Fires, and Aliens with animations.

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { GameState, LevelConfig, Direction } from '../types';
import { Trophy, Star, Navigation, Fuel, Flame, Zap } from 'lucide-react';

interface StageProps {
  level: LevelConfig;
  gameState: GameState;
}

const Stage: React.FC<StageProps> = ({ level, gameState }) => {
  const { gridSize } = level;
  const cellSize = 100 / gridSize;

  const renderGrid = () => {
    const cells = [];
    for (let y = 0; y < gridSize; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < gridSize; x++) {
        const isWall = level.obstacles.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y);
        const isGoal = level.goalPos.x === x && level.goalPos.y === y;
        const isFuel = level.fuelPos && level.fuelPos.x === x && level.fuelPos.y === y && !gameState.fuelCollected;
        
        // Dynamic Obstacles
        const isRock = level.rocks.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.destroyedRocks.some(r => r.x === x && r.y === y);
        const isFire = level.fires.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.extinguishedFires.some(f => f.x === x && f.y === y);
        const isAlien = level.aliens.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.defeatedAliens.some(a => a.x === x && a.y === y);

        const isVisited = gameState.visited.some(v => v.x === x && v.y === y);
        
        cells.push(
          <div
            key={`${x}-${y}`}
            className={`
              border border-blue-100 relative flex items-center justify-center transition-colors duration-500
              ${isWall ? 'bg-slate-700 rounded-sm shadow-inner' : (isVisited ? 'bg-green-100' : 'bg-white/80')}
              ${isGoal ? 'bg-yellow-100' : ''}
              ${isFuel || isRock || isFire || isAlien ? 'bg-slate-50' : ''}
            `}
            style={{ width: `${cellSize}%`, height: `${cellSize}%` }}
          >
            {isGoal && !gameState.isCompleted && <Star className="w-8 h-8 text-yellow-500 animate-spin-slow drop-shadow-md" fill="currentColor" />}
            {isFuel && <Fuel className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-500 animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />}
            {isRock && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md">🪨</span>}
            {isFire && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md animate-pulse">🔥</span>}
            {isAlien && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md animate-bounce">👾</span>}
          </div>
        );
      }
    }
    return cells;
  };

  const getRotation = (dir: Direction) => {
    switch (dir) {
      case Direction.NORTH: return 'rotate(0deg)';
      case Direction.EAST: return 'rotate(90deg)';
      case Direction.SOUTH: return 'rotate(180deg)';
      case Direction.WEST: return 'rotate(270deg)';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-xl relative border-t-4 border-indigo-200">
      <div className="absolute -top-5 bg-indigo-500 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-bold shadow-md z-10 flex items-center gap-2">
         <Navigation size={18} /> ส่วนแสดงผล
      </div>

      <div className="relative w-full max-w-[400px] aspect-square bg-indigo-200/50 p-2 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border-4 border-white mt-6">
        <div className="absolute inset-2 flex flex-wrap bg-blue-50/50 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
          {renderGrid()}
        </div>

        {/* Character */}
        <div className="absolute inset-2 pointer-events-none">
            <div className="absolute transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out z-10 flex items-center justify-center"
            style={{ left: `${gameState.characterPos.x * cellSize}%`, top: `${gameState.characterPos.y * cellSize}%`, width: `${cellSize}%`, height: `${cellSize}%`, transform: getRotation(gameState.characterDir) }}>
                <div className="w-4/5 h-4/5 relative animate-wiggle">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full drop-shadow-lg">
                        <rect x="20" y="30" width="60" height="50" rx="10" fill="#6366f1" />
                        <circle cx="50" cy="20" r="15" fill="#6366f1" />
                        <circle cx="45" cy="18" r="3" fill="white" />
                        <circle cx="55" cy="18" r="3" fill="white" />
                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        {gameState.isCompleted && (
           <div className="absolute inset-0 z-20 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-500 rounded-xl">
              <Trophy className="w-24 h-24 text-yellow-400 mb-4 drop-shadow-2xl animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />
              <h2 className="text-4xl font-black text-white">สุดยอด!</h2>
           </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {gameState.message && (
        <div className="absolute -bottom-2 left-4 right-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border-4 border-yellow-400 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 z-30">
          <p className="text-lg text-center font-bold text-gray-700">"{gameState.message}"</p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default Stage;
```

### 5. `App.tsx`
Rewritten to use the new **Simulation Engine** for executing code with logic blocks. Also includes the white screen crash fix, the new progressive guide system, and audio improvements.

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import BlocklyComponent from './components/BlocklyComponent';
import Stage from './components/Stage';
import { LEVELS, DEMO_LEVEL, BG_MUSIC_URL } from './constants';
import { GameState, Direction, Command, Position, CommandType } from './types';
import { 
  Play, RotateCcw, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Volume2, Home, Bot, Music, Music4, SkipForward, Code, Puzzle, Award, BookOpen, CheckCircle2, Terminal
} from 'lucide-react';

const App: React.FC = () => {
  // Navigation
  const [showLanding, setShowLanding] = useState(true);
  const [showCertificate, setShowCertificate] = useState(false);
  
  // Tutorial & Guide
  const [isTutorialMode, setIsTutorialMode] = useState(false);
  const [tutorialStep, setTutorialStep] = useState(0);
  const [showBlockGuide, setShowBlockGuide] = useState(false);
  const [guideTriggeredLevel, setGuideTriggeredLevel] = useState<number>(-1);

  // Game
  const [currentLevelIndex, setCurrentLevelIndex] = useState(0);
  const [code, setCode] = useState("");
  const [blockCount, setBlockCount] = useState(0);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<GameState>({
    characterPos: { x: 0, y: 0 }, characterDir: Direction.EAST,
    isCompleted: false, message: null, isRunning: false, visited: [],
    hasFuel: false, fuelCollected: false,
    destroyedRocks: [], extinguishedFires: [], defeatedAliens: []
  });
  const [completedLevels, setCompletedLevels] = useState<number[]>([]);
  const [isMusicPlaying, setIsMusicPlaying] = useState(false);
  const [stepIndex, setStepIndex] = useState(0);

  const activeLevel = isTutorialMode ? DEMO_LEVEL : LEVELS[currentLevelIndex];
  
  // Simulation Trace for Playback
  const traceRef = useRef<GameState[]>([]);
  const timeoutsRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>[]>([]);
  const bgmRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null);

  // Music Init
  useEffect(() => {
    bgmRef.current = new Audio(BG_MUSIC_URL); 
    bgmRef.current.loop = true;
    bgmRef.current.volume = 0.25; // 25% Volume as requested
    return () => { if (bgmRef.current) bgmRef.current.pause(); };
  }, []);

  // Natural Voice V5
  const speak = (text: string) => {
    if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
      window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
      const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      let voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices();
      
      const selectVoice = () => {
          // Priority: Google Thai -> Microsoft Thai -> Any Thai
          let voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.includes('th'));
          if (!voice) voice = voices.find(v => v.lang.includes('th') && !v.name.includes('Desktop'));
          if (!voice) voice = voices.find(v => v.lang.includes('th'));
          if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;

          utterance.lang = 'th-TH';
          utterance.rate = 1.0; 
          utterance.pitch = 1.0; 
          utterance.volume = 1.0; // Max volume
          window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
      }
      if (voices.length === 0) window.speechSynthesis.onvoiceschanged = () => { voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices(); selectVoice(); };
      else selectVoice();
    }
  };

  // Start & Tutorial Logic
  const handleStart = () => {
    setShowLanding(false);
    if (bgmRef.current) bgmRef.current.play().then(() => setIsMusicPlaying(true)).catch(() => {});
    startTutorial();
  };

  const startTutorial = () => {
      setIsTutorialMode(true);
      setTutorialStep(0);
      speak("ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ โค้ด คราฟ ครับ");
  };

  const nextTutorialStep = () => {
      setTutorialStep(prev => prev + 1);
      const steps = ["", "โจทย์ด้านซ้าย", "พื้นที่เขียนโค้ดตรงกลาง", "ปุ่มควบคุมด้านล่าง", "ผลลัพธ์ด้านขวา", "คู่มือบล็อก"];
      if (steps[tutorialStep + 1]) speak(steps[tutorialStep + 1]);
      if (tutorialStep + 1 === 5) setShowBlockGuide(true);
  };

  const finishTutorial = () => {
      setShowBlockGuide(false);
      setIsTutorialMode(false);
      setCurrentLevelIndex(0);
  };

  const toggleMusic = () => {
    if (bgmRef.current) {
        if (isMusicPlaying) bgmRef.current.pause();
        else bgmRef.current.play().catch(() => {});
        setIsMusicPlaying(!isMusicPlaying);
    }
  };

  // Progressive Guide Trigger
  useEffect(() => {
      if (isTutorialMode || showLanding) return;
      
      const guidePoints = [0, 4, 14, 20, 25, 30, 35]; // Levels 1, 5, 15, 21, 26, 31, 36 (Index-1)
      if (guidePoints.includes(currentLevelIndex) && guideTriggeredLevel !== currentLevelIndex) {
          setTimeout(() => {
              setShowBlockGuide(true);
              setGuideTriggeredLevel(currentLevelIndex);
              
              let msg = "";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 0) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกพื้นฐานครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 4) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกทำซ้ำ ช่วยให้เขียนโค้ดสั้นลงครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 14) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเติมน้ำมันครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 20) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเจาะหินและวนซ้ำตลอดครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 25) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกรดน้ำดับไฟครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 30) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเงื่อนไข ถ้าเจอหิน ให้เจาะ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 35) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเงื่อนไขแบบเลือกทำ ถ้าเจอเอเลี่ยนให้ยิง";
              speak(msg);
          }, 1000);
      } else {
          // Auto-speak level intro if not showing guide
          if (!showBlockGuide) {
             const timer = setTimeout(() => speak(activeLevel.title + ". " + activeLevel.description), 800);
             return () => clearTimeout(timer);
          }
      }
  }, [currentLevelIndex, isTutorialMode, showLanding]);

  // Reset Level
  useEffect(() => { resetLevel(); }, [currentLevelIndex, isTutorialMode]);

  const resetLevel = () => {
    timeoutsRef.current.forEach(clearTimeout);
    timeoutsRef.current = [];
    setGameState({
      characterPos: { ...activeLevel.startPos }, characterDir: activeLevel.startDir,
      isCompleted: false, message: null, isRunning: false, visited: [],
      hasFuel: !!activeLevel.fuelPos, fuelCollected: false,
      destroyedRocks: [], extinguishedFires: [], defeatedAliens: []
    });
    setStepIndex(0);
    traceRef.current = [];
  };

  // --- SIMULATION ENGINE ---
  // Runs the code virtually to generate a trace of states
  const runSimulation = () => {
      // Create a virtual state copy
      let simState = {
          pos: { ...activeLevel.startPos },
          dir: activeLevel.startDir,
          fuelCollected: false,
          rocks: [...activeLevel.rocks], // We remove from this list in sim
          fires: [...activeLevel.fires],
          aliens: [...activeLevel.aliens],
          msgs: [] as string[]
      };

      const trace: GameState[] = [];
      const MAX_STEPS = 100; // Safety break
      let steps = 0;
      let crashMsg = null;

      // API for Generated Code
      const api = {
          move: () => {
              if (steps++ > MAX_STEPS || crashMsg) return;
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const next = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              
              // Check bounds
              if (next.x < 0 || next.x >= activeLevel.gridSize || next.y < 0 || next.y >= activeLevel.gridSize) {
                  crashMsg = "ตกขอบโลก!"; return;
              }
              // Check Walls
              if (activeLevel.obstacles.some(o => o.x === next.x && o.y === next.y)) {
                  crashMsg = "ชนกำแพง!"; return;
              }
              // Check Live Obstacles
              if (simState.rocks.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "ชนหิน!"; return; }
              if (simState.fires.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "โดนไฟคลอก!"; return; }
              if (simState.aliens.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "โดนเอเลี่ยนจับ!"; return; }

              simState.pos = next;
              recordState(null);
          },
          turnLeft: () => { simState.dir = (simState.dir + 3) % 4; recordState(null); },
          turnRight: () => { simState.dir = (simState.dir + 1) % 4; recordState(null); },
          collect: () => {
               if (activeLevel.fuelPos && simState.pos.x === activeLevel.fuelPos.x && simState.pos.y === activeLevel.fuelPos.y) {
                   simState.fuelCollected = true;
                   recordState("เติมน้ำมันแล้ว!");
               } else {
                   recordState("ไม่มีอะไรให้เติม");
               }
          },
          drill: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.rocks.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.rocks.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("เจาะหินแตกละเอียด!");
              } else {
                  recordState("เจาะลมทำไม?");
              }
          },
          water: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.fires.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.fires.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("ดับไฟสำเร็จ!");
              } else {
                  recordState("ฉีดน้ำเล่น?");
              }
          },
          shoot: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.aliens.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.aliens.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("ยิงเอเลี่ยนดับ!");
              } else {
                  recordState("ยิงฟรี?");
              }
          },
          // Logic Checks
          check: (type: string) => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              if (type === 'ROCK') return simState.rocks.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (type === 'FIRE') return simState.fires.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (type === 'ALIEN') return simState.aliens.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              return false;
          }
      };

      const recordState = (msg: string | null) => {
          // Push a snapshot
          trace.push({
              characterPos: { ...simState.pos },
              characterDir: simState.dir,
              isCompleted: false,
              message: msg,
              isRunning: true,
              visited: [], // Not tracked in trace for logic simplicity, handled in rendering
              hasFuel: !!activeLevel.fuelPos,
              fuelCollected: simState.fuelCollected,
              destroyedRocks: activeLevel.rocks.filter(r => !simState.rocks.includes(r)),
              extinguishedFires: activeLevel.fires.filter(f => !simState.fires.includes(f)),
              defeatedAliens: activeLevel.aliens.filter(a => !simState.aliens.includes(a))
          });
      };

      // RUN THE CODE
      try {
          // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
          const runner = new Function('api', code);
          runner(api);
      } catch (e) { console.error("Runtime Error", e); }

      // Check Win at end of trace
      if (crashMsg) {
          trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: crashMsg, isRunning: false });
      } else {
          // Check Goal
          const last = trace.length > 0 ? trace[trace.length-1] : { characterPos: simState.pos };
          if (last.characterPos.x === activeLevel.goalPos.x && last.characterPos.y === activeLevel.goalPos.y) {
              if (activeLevel.fuelPos && !simState.fuelCollected) {
                   trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: "ถึงดาวแล้วแต่ลืมเติมน้ำมัน!", isRunning: false });
              } else {
                   trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], isCompleted: true, message: "สำเร็จ! เก่งมาก", isRunning: false });
              }
          } else {
               trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: "ยังไม่ถึงเป้าหมาย", isRunning: false });
          }
      }

      return trace;
  };

  const getDirVector = (dir: Direction) => {
      if (dir === Direction.NORTH) return { x: 0, y: -1 };
      if (dir === Direction.EAST) return { x: 1, y: 0 };
      if (dir === Direction.SOUTH) return { x: 0, y: 1 };
      return { x: -1, y: 0 };
  };

  const handleRun = () => {
      if (!code.trim()) { speak("วางบล็อกก่อนนะครับ"); return; }
      resetLevel();
      const trace = runSimulation();
      traceRef.current = trace;
      setGameState(prev => ({ ...prev, isRunning: true }));
      playTrace(trace);
  };

  const playTrace = (trace: GameState[]) => {
      trace.forEach((state, i) => {
          const id = setTimeout(() => {
              setGameState(prev => ({
                  ...state,
                  visited: [...prev.visited, state.characterPos] // Accumulate visited path visually
              }));
              setStepIndex(i + 1);
              
              if (state.message) speak(state.message);
              if (state.isCompleted && !isTutorialMode) {
                   if (!completedLevels.includes(activeLevel.id)) setCompletedLevels(p => [...p, activeLevel.id]);
                   if (activeLevel.id === LEVELS.length) setTimeout(() => setShowCertificate(true), 1500);
              }
          }, i * 600); // 600ms per step
          timeoutsRef.current.push(id);
      });
  };

  // --- UI COMPONENTS ---

  const BlockGuideModal = () => {
      if (!showBlockGuide) return null;
      // Show relevant blocks based on level
      let guides = [];
      if (currentLevelIndex < 4) {
          guides = [
              { icon: "🚩", label: "เริ่มต้น", desc: "จุดเริ่ม" },
              { icon: "➡️", label: "เดินหน้า", desc: "เดิน 1 ช่อง" },
              { icon: "↩️", label: "เลี้ยวซ้าย", desc: "หมุนซ้าย" },
              { icon: "↪️", label: "เลี้ยวขวา", desc: "หมุนขวา" }
          ];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 14) {
          guides = [{ icon: "🔄", label: "ทำซ้ำ", desc: "ทำคำสั่งข้างในหลายรอบ" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 20) {
          guides = [{ icon: "⛽", label: "เติมน้ำมัน", desc: "เก็บน้ำมัน" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 25) {
          guides = [
              { icon: "♾️", label: "วนซ้ำตลอด", desc: "ทำไปเรื่อยๆ จนจบ" },
              { icon: "⛏️", label: "เจาะหิน", desc: "ทำลายหินข้างหน้า" }
          ];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 30) {
          guides = [{ icon: "💧", label: "รดน้ำ", desc: "ดับไฟข้างหน้า" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 35) {
          guides = [{ icon: "❓", label: "ถ้าเจอ...", desc: "ถ้าเจอสิ่งกีดขวาง ให้ทำ..." }];
      } else {
          guides = [
              { icon: "❓", label: "ถ้า...มิฉะนั้น", desc: "ทางเลือกสองทาง" },
              { icon: "🔫", label: "ยิงปืน", desc: "กำจัดเอเลี่ยน" }
          ];
      }

      return (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-4xl w-full border-4 border-indigo-500 relative text-center">
                  <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-indigo-800 mb-6">คู่มือบล็อกใหม่</h2>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-8">
                      {guides.map((g, i) => (
                          <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-4 bg-slate-50 p-4 rounded-xl border">
                              <div className="text-4xl">{g.icon}</div>
                              <div className="text-left">
                                  <div className="font-black text-lg text-indigo-700">{g.label}</div>
                                  <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{g.desc}</div>
                              </div>
                          </div>
                      ))}
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={() => setShowBlockGuide(false)} className="px-10 py-4 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full text-2xl font-bold shadow-xl">
                      เข้าใจแล้ว
                  </button>
              </div>
          </div>
      );
  };

  const TutorialOverlay = () => {
      if (!isTutorialMode || showBlockGuide) return null;
      const steps = [
          { text: "Block Coding คือการสั่งงานคอมพิวเตอร์ด้วยการต่อบล็อกเหมือนเลโก้" },
          { text: "โจทย์อยู่ทางซ้าย", position: "left-10 top-1/2" },
          { text: "ลากบล็อกมาวางตรงกลาง", position: "top-1/3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" },
          { text: "กดปุ่มเล่นเพื่อรันคำสั่ง", position: "bottom-24 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" },
          { text: "หุ่นยนต์จะเดินในช่องทางขวา", position: "right-10 top-1/2" }
      ];
      
      const currentStep = steps[tutorialStep];
      if (!currentStep) return null;

      return (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-black/70 flex flex-col">
             <div className={`absolute bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl border-4 border-yellow-400 max-w-xl w-[90%] z-[70] text-center ${currentStep.position || 'top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2'}`}>
                 <p className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">{currentStep.text}</p>
                 <button onClick={nextTutorialStep} className="px-8 py-3 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full font-bold mx-auto flex items-center gap-2">
                     <CheckCircle2 /> {tutorialStep === 0 ? 'เริ่มเลย' : 'ต่อไป'}
                 </button>
             </div>
          </div>
      );
  };

  // --- RENDER ---
  if (showLanding) return (
      <div className="h-screen w-full bg-code-pattern flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 relative overflow-hidden text-white">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-code-overlay pointer-events-none"></div>
          <div className="relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center animate-in zoom-in duration-500 text-center">
              <div className="bg-cyan-500/20 p-6 rounded-full mb-8 border border-cyan-400 animate-bounce">
                  <Bot size={100} className="text-cyan-400" />
              </div>
              <h1 className="text-7xl font-black text-cyan-400 mb-4 font-tech tracking-wider">CODE CRAFT</h1>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-300 mb-12 font-tech">< บทเรียน Block Coding /></h2>
              <button onClick={handleStart} className="px-12 py-6 bg-green-500 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                  <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-3"><Play fill="currentColor" /> เริ่มเรียนรู้</span>
              </button>
              <div className="mt-16 text-slate-400">
                  <p className="text-xl font-bold text-white">นายธนิท ธนพัตนิรัชกุล</p>
                  <p>ตำแหน่งครู โรงเรียนกาฬสินธุ์ปัญญานุกูล จังหวัดกาฬสินธุ์</p>
              </div>
          </div>
      </div>
  );

  if (showCertificate) return (
      <div className="h-screen w-full bg-indigo-900/90 flex items-center justify-center p-4 z-50 fixed inset-0">
         <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-10 text-center border-8 border-yellow-400 shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in">
             <Award className="w-32 h-32 text-yellow-400 mx-auto mb-6 animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />
             <h1 className="text-5xl font-black text-indigo-800 mb-6">ยินดีด้วย!</h1>
             <p className="text-3xl text-gray-700 font-bold mb-8">คุณคือ Code Craft Master!</p>
             <button onClick={() => { setShowCertificate(false); setShowLanding(true); setCurrentLevelIndex(0); }} className="px-8 py-4 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2 mx-auto">
                <Home /> กลับหน้าแรก
             </button>
         </div>
      </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="h-screen flex flex-col bg-slate-50 font-sans relative">
      <TutorialOverlay />
      <BlockGuideModal />

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="h-16 bg-white border-b flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-20">
          <button onClick={() => setShowLanding(true)} className="text-indigo-600"><Home size={28} /></button>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Bot className="text-indigo-600" /><span className="text-3xl font-black text-indigo-800 font-tech">Code Craft</span></div>
          <button onClick={toggleMusic} className="text-indigo-600">{isMusicPlaying ? <Music size={24} /> : <Music4 size={24} />}</button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden relative">
        {/* Left Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-3/12 flex flex-col border-r bg-white p-4 ${tutorialStep === 1 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
               <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(Math.max(0, currentLevelIndex - 1))} disabled={isTutorialMode || currentLevelIndex===0}><ChevronLeft size={32} /></button>
               <span className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-800">{isTutorialMode ? 'Demo' : `${activeLevel.id}/40`}</span>
               <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(Math.min(LEVELS.length - 1, currentLevelIndex + 1))} disabled={isTutorialMode || currentLevelIndex===LEVELS.length-1}><ChevronRight size={32} /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-yellow-50 p-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-yellow-200 relative mb-4">
                <button onClick={() => speak(activeLevel.title + ". " + activeLevel.description)} className="absolute top-3 right-3 text-yellow-500"><Volume2 /></button>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-900 mb-2">{activeLevel.title}</h2>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-700 font-medium">{activeLevel.description}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-blue-100">
                <p className="text-lg text-blue-800 font-bold">💡 คำใบ้: {activeLevel.hint}</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        {/* Center Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-5/12 flex flex-col relative bg-slate-100 ${tutorialStep === 2 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex-1 relative">
                <BlocklyComponent 
                    key={isTutorialMode ? 'tutorial' : currentLevelIndex}
                    initialXml={`<xml><block type="kru_start" x="40" y="40"></block></xml>`}
                    toolbox={activeLevel.allowedBlocks}
                    onCodeChange={setCode}
                    onBlockCountChange={setBlockCount}
                />
            </div>
            <div className={`p-4 bg-white border-t flex justify-between shadow-xl z-20 ${tutorialStep === 3 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
                <button onClick={resetLevel} className="flex flex-col items-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500"><RotateCcw /><span className="text-xs">เริ่มใหม่</span></button>
                <button onClick={handleRun} disabled={gameState.isRunning} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-8 py-3 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 disabled:bg-gray-300">
                    <Play size={28} fill="currentColor" /><span className="text-xl font-black">เล่น</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-4/12 bg-white flex flex-col p-6 border-l relative ${tutorialStep === 4 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <Stage level={activeLevel} gameState={gameState} />
            {gameState.isCompleted && !isTutorialMode && (
                <div className="mt-6 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom">
                    <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(currentLevelIndex + 1)} className="w-full py-5 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-2xl font-black rounded-2xl shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                        ไปบทถัดไป <ChevronRight strokeWidth={4} />
                    </button>
                </div>
            )}
            {gameState.isCompleted && isTutorialMode && (
                <div className="mt-6"><button onClick={nextTutorialStep} className="w-full py-5 bg-green-500 text-white text-2xl font-black rounded-2xl">เข้าใจแล้ว</button></div>
            )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default App;

}

}

  payload?: string;
}

export interface LevelConfig {
  id: number;
  title: string;
  description: string;
  hint: string;
  startPos: Position;
  goalPos: Position;
  fuelPos?: Position; 
  startDir: Direction;
  gridSize: number;
  obstacles: Position[]; // Walls
  rocks: Position[];     // Breakable with Drill
  fires: Position[];     // Extinguish with Water
  aliens: Position[];    // Defeat with Shoot
  allowedBlocks: string; 
  idealBlockCount: number;
}

export interface GameState {
  characterPos: Position;
  characterDir: Direction;
  isCompleted: boolean;
  message: string | null;
  isRunning: boolean;
  visited: Position[]; 
  hasFuel: boolean; 
  fuelCollected: boolean;
  destroyedRocks: Position[];
  extinguishedFires: Position[];
  defeatedAliens: Position[];
}
```

## constants.ts

Expanded to 40 levels, added new toolboxes, and updated the music to a chill lo-fi track.

## components/BlocklyComponent.tsx

Added definitions for `kru_drill`, `kru_water`, `kru_shoot`, `kru_forever`, `kru_if_obstacle`, and `kru_if_else_obstacle`.

```tsx
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

declare const Blockly: any;

interface BlocklyComponentProps {
  initialXml: string;
  toolbox: string;
  onCodeChange: (code: string) => void;
  onBlockCountChange?: (count: number) => void;
}

const BlocklyComponent: React.FC<BlocklyComponentProps> = ({ initialXml, toolbox, onCodeChange, onBlockCountChange }) => {
  const blocklyDiv = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const workspaceRef = useRef<any>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!blocklyDiv.current) return;
    if (typeof Blockly === 'undefined') return;

    // Define Blocks
    const defineBlock = (type: string, json: any, gen: (block: any) => string) => {
        if (!Blockly.Blocks[type]) {
            Blockly.Blocks[type] = { init: function() { this.jsonInit(json); } };
            if (Blockly.JavaScript) Blockly.JavaScript[type] = gen;
        }
    };

    defineBlock('kru_start', {
        "type": "kru_start", "message0": "🚩 เริ่มทำงาน", "nextStatement": null, "colour": 160
    }, () => '');

    defineBlock('kru_move', {
        "type": "kru_move", "message0": "เดินหน้า %1 1 ช่อง", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "➡️", "class": "block-icon-large"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 260
    }, () => `api.move();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_turn_left', {
        "type": "kru_turn_left", "message0": "เลี้ยวซ้าย %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "↩️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 210
    }, () => `api.turnLeft();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_turn_right', {
        "type": "kru_turn_right", "message0": "เลี้ยวขวา %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "↪️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 210
    }, () => `api.turnRight();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_collect', {
        "type": "kru_collect", "message0": "เติมน้ำมัน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "⛽"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 20
    }, () => `api.collect();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_drill', {
        "type": "kru_drill", "message0": "เจาะหิน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "⛏️"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 60
    }, () => `api.drill();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_water', {
        "type": "kru_water", "message0": "รดน้ำ %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "💧"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 200
    }, () => `api.water();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_shoot', {
        "type": "kru_shoot", "message0": "ยิงปืน %1", "args0": [{"type": "field_label", "text": "🔫"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 0
    }, () => `api.shoot();\n`);

    defineBlock('kru_loop', {
        "type": "kru_loop", "message0": "🔄 ทำซ้ำ %1 ครั้ง %2 %3", "args0": [{"type": "field_number", "name": "TIMES", "value": 3}, {"type": "input_dummy"}, {"type": "input_statement", "name": "DO"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 120
    }, (block: any) => {
        const repeats = block.getFieldValue('TIMES');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        return `for (var i = 0; i < ${repeats}; i++) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_forever', {
        "type": "kru_forever", "message0": "♾️ วนซ้ำตลอด %1 %2", "args0": [{"type": "input_dummy"}, {"type": "input_statement", "name": "DO"}], "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 290
    }, (block: any) => {
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        // In our simulation, we limit steps, so a simple loop works
        return `for (var k = 0; k < 50; k++) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_if_obstacle', {
        "type": "kru_if_obstacle", 
        "message0": "❓ ถ้าเจอ %1 ให้ทำ %2 %3", 
        "args0": [
            { "type": "field_dropdown", "name": "OBSTACLE", "options": [["หิน 🪨", "ROCK"], ["ไฟ 🔥", "FIRE"], ["เอเลี่ยน 👾", "ALIEN"]] }, 
            { "type": "input_dummy" }, 
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "DO" }
        ], 
        "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 45
    }, (block: any) => {
        const obs = block.getFieldValue('OBSTACLE');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        return `if (api.check('${obs}')) {\n${branch}}\n`;
    });

    defineBlock('kru_if_else_obstacle', {
        "type": "kru_if_else_obstacle", 
        "message0": "❓ ถ้าเจอ %1 ให้ทำ %2 %3 นอกเหนือจากนี้ %4", 
        "args0": [
            { "type": "field_dropdown", "name": "OBSTACLE", "options": [["หิน 🪨", "ROCK"], ["ไฟ 🔥", "FIRE"], ["เอเลี่ยน 👾", "ALIEN"]] }, 
            { "type": "input_dummy" }, 
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "DO" },
            { "type": "input_statement", "name": "ELSE" }
        ], 
        "previousStatement": null, "nextStatement": null, "colour": 45
    }, (block: any) => {
        const obs = block.getFieldValue('OBSTACLE');
        const branch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'DO');
        const elseBranch = Blockly.JavaScript.statementToCode(block, 'ELSE');
        return `if (api.check('${obs}')) {\n${branch}} else {\n${elseBranch}}\n`;
    });


    // Initialize Workspace
    try {
        workspaceRef.current = Blockly.inject(blocklyDiv.current, {
            toolbox: toolbox,
            scrollbars: false,
            trashcan: true,
            sounds: true,
            zoom: { controls: true, startScale: 1.3, maxScale: 3, minScale: 0.5 }
        });

        const xmlStr = initialXml || '<xml><block type="kru_start" x="50" y="50"></block></xml>';
        if (Blockly.Xml?.domToWorkspace) {
            Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.utils.xml.textToDom(xmlStr), workspaceRef.current);
        }

        workspaceRef.current.addChangeListener(() => {
            if (Blockly.JavaScript) {
                try {
                    const code = Blockly.JavaScript.workspaceToCode(workspaceRef.current);
                    onCodeChange(code);
                    if (onBlockCountChange) onBlockCountChange(workspaceRef.current.getAllBlocks(false).length);
                } catch (e) { console.error(e); }
            }
        });

    } catch (e) { console.error("Init Error", e); }

    const handleResize = () => Blockly.svgResize(workspaceRef.current);
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
    return () => {
        window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
        if (workspaceRef.current) workspaceRef.current.dispose();
    };
  }, [toolbox]); // Re-init when toolbox changes

  return <div className="w-full h-full relative font-bold"><div ref={blocklyDiv} className="absolute inset-0" /></div>;
};

export default BlocklyComponent;
```

## components/Stage.tsx

Updated the renderer to visualize Rocks, Fires, and Aliens.

```tsx
import React from 'react';
import { GameState, LevelConfig, Direction } from '../types';
import { Trophy, Star, Navigation, Fuel, Flame, Zap } from 'lucide-react';

interface StageProps {
  level: LevelConfig;
  gameState: GameState;
}

const Stage: React.FC<StageProps> = ({ level, gameState }) => {
  const { gridSize } = level;
  const cellSize = 100 / gridSize;

  const renderGrid = () => {
    const cells = [];
    for (let y = 0; y < gridSize; y++) {
      for (let x = 0; x < gridSize; x++) {
        const isWall = level.obstacles.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y);
        const isGoal = level.goalPos.x === x && level.goalPos.y === y;
        const isFuel = level.fuelPos && level.fuelPos.x === x && level.fuelPos.y === y && !gameState.fuelCollected;
        
        // Dynamic Obstacles
        const isRock = level.rocks.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.destroyedRocks.some(r => r.x === x && r.y === y);
        const isFire = level.fires.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.extinguishedFires.some(f => f.x === x && f.y === y);
        const isAlien = level.aliens.some(o => o.x === x && o.y === y) && !gameState.defeatedAliens.some(a => a.x === x && a.y === y);

        const isVisited = gameState.visited.some(v => v.x === x && v.y === y);
        
        cells.push(
          <div
            key={`${x}-${y}`}
            className={`
              border border-blue-100 relative flex items-center justify-center transition-colors duration-500
              ${isWall ? 'bg-slate-700 rounded-sm shadow-inner' : (isVisited ? 'bg-green-100' : 'bg-white/80')}
              ${isGoal ? 'bg-yellow-100' : ''}
              ${isFuel || isRock || isFire || isAlien ? 'bg-slate-50' : ''}
            `}
            style={{ width: `${cellSize}%`, height: `${cellSize}%` }}
          >
            {isGoal && !gameState.isCompleted && <Star className="w-8 h-8 text-yellow-500 animate-spin-slow drop-shadow-md" fill="currentColor" />}
            {isFuel && <Fuel className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-500 animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />}
            {isRock && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md">🪨</span>}
            {isFire && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md animate-pulse">🔥</span>}
            {isAlien && <span className="text-4xl drop-shadow-md animate-bounce">👾</span>}
          </div>
        );
      }
    }
    return cells;
  };

  const getRotation = (dir: Direction) => {
    switch (dir) {
      case Direction.NORTH: return 'rotate(0deg)';
      case Direction.EAST: return 'rotate(90deg)';
      case Direction.SOUTH: return 'rotate(180deg)';
      case Direction.WEST: return 'rotate(270deg)';
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full bg-indigo-50 p-4 rounded-xl relative border-t-4 border-indigo-200">
      <div className="absolute -top-5 bg-indigo-500 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-bold shadow-md z-10 flex items-center gap-2">
         <Navigation size={18} /> ส่วนแสดงผล
      </div>

      <div className="relative w-full max-w-[400px] aspect-square bg-indigo-200/50 p-2 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border-4 border-white mt-6">
        <div className="absolute inset-2 flex flex-wrap bg-blue-50/50 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
          {renderGrid()}
        </div>

        {/* Character */}
        <div className="absolute inset-2 pointer-events-none">
            <div className="absolute transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out z-10 flex items-center justify-center"
            style={{ left: `${gameState.characterPos.x * cellSize}%`, top: `${gameState.characterPos.y * cellSize}%`, width: `${cellSize}%`, height: `${cellSize}%`, transform: getRotation(gameState.characterDir) }}>
                <div className="w-4/5 h-4/5 relative animate-wiggle">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" className="w-full h-full drop-shadow-lg">
                        <rect x="20" y="30" width="60" height="50" rx="10" fill="#6366f1" />
                        <circle cx="50" cy="20" r="15" fill="#6366f1" />
                        <circle cx="45" cy="18" r="3" fill="white" />
                        <circle cx="55" cy="18" r="3" fill="white" />
                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        {gameState.isCompleted && (
           <div className="absolute inset-0 z-20 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-500 rounded-xl">
              <Trophy className="w-24 h-24 text-yellow-400 mb-4 drop-shadow-2xl animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />
              <h2 className="text-4xl font-black text-white">สุดยอด!</h2>
           </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {gameState.message && (
        <div className="absolute -bottom-2 left-4 right-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl border-4 border-yellow-400 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 z-30">
          <p className="text-lg text-center font-bold text-gray-700">"{gameState.message}"</p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default Stage;
```

## App.tsx

Replaced the execution queue with a **trace-based simulation engine** to allow logic blocks. Added progressive guides and fixed the crash.

```tsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import BlocklyComponent from './components/BlocklyComponent';
import Stage from './components/Stage';
import { LEVELS, DEMO_LEVEL, BG_MUSIC_URL } from './constants';
import { GameState, Direction, Command, Position, CommandType } from './types';
import { 
  Play, RotateCcw, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Volume2, Home, Bot, Music, Music4, SkipForward, Code, Puzzle, Award, BookOpen, CheckCircle2, Terminal
} from 'lucide-react';

const App: React.FC = () => {
  // Navigation
  const [showLanding, setShowLanding] = useState(true);
  const [showCertificate, setShowCertificate] = useState(false);
  
  // Tutorial & Guide
  const [isTutorialMode, setIsTutorialMode] = useState(false);
  const [tutorialStep, setTutorialStep] = useState(0);
  const [showBlockGuide, setShowBlockGuide] = useState(false);
  const [guideTriggeredLevel, setGuideTriggeredLevel] = useState<number>(-1);

  // Game
  const [currentLevelIndex, setCurrentLevelIndex] = useState(0);
  const [code, setCode] = useState("");
  const [blockCount, setBlockCount] = useState(0);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<GameState>({
    characterPos: { x: 0, y: 0 }, characterDir: Direction.EAST,
    isCompleted: false, message: null, isRunning: false, visited: [],
    hasFuel: false, fuelCollected: false,
    destroyedRocks: [], extinguishedFires: [], defeatedAliens: []
  });
  const [completedLevels, setCompletedLevels] = useState<number[]>([]);
  const [isMusicPlaying, setIsMusicPlaying] = useState(false);
  const [stepIndex, setStepIndex] = useState(0);

  const activeLevel = isTutorialMode ? DEMO_LEVEL : LEVELS[currentLevelIndex];
  
  // Simulation Trace for Playback
  const traceRef = useRef<GameState[]>([]);
  const timeoutsRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>[]>([]);
  const bgmRef = useRef<HTMLAudioElement | null>(null);

  // Music Init
  useEffect(() => {
    bgmRef.current = new Audio(BG_MUSIC_URL); 
    bgmRef.current.loop = true;
    bgmRef.current.volume = 0.25; // Set volume to 25%
    return () => { if (bgmRef.current) bgmRef.current.pause(); };
  }, []);

  // Natural Voice V5
  const speak = (text: string) => {
    if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
      window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
      const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
      let voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices();
      
      const selectVoice = () => {
          // Priority: Google Thai -> Microsoft Thai -> Any Thai
          let voice = voices.find(v => v.name.includes('Google') && v.lang.includes('th'));
          if (!voice) voice = voices.find(v => v.lang.includes('th') && !v.name.includes('Desktop'));
          if (!voice) voice = voices.find(v => v.lang.includes('th'));
          if (voice) utterance.voice = voice;

          utterance.lang = 'th-TH';
          utterance.rate = 1.0; 
          utterance.pitch = 1.0; 
          utterance.volume = 1.0; // Max volume
          window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
      }
      if (voices.length === 0) window.speechSynthesis.onvoiceschanged = () => { voices = window.speechSynthesis.getVoices(); selectVoice(); };
      else selectVoice();
    }
  };

  // Start & Tutorial Logic
  const handleStart = () => {
    setShowLanding(false);
    if (bgmRef.current) bgmRef.current.play().then(() => setIsMusicPlaying(true)).catch(() => {});
    startTutorial();
  };

  const startTutorial = () => {
      setIsTutorialMode(true);
      setTutorialStep(0);
      speak("ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ โค้ด คราฟ ครับ");
  };

  const nextTutorialStep = () => {
      const next = tutorialStep + 1;
      setTutorialStep(next);
      
      const steps = ["", "โจทย์ด้านซ้าย", "พื้นที่เขียนโค้ดตรงกลาง", "ปุ่มควบคุมด้านล่าง", "ผลลัพธ์ด้านขวา", "คู่มือบล็อก"];
      if (steps[next]) speak(steps[next]);
      
      if (next === 5) {
          setShowBlockGuide(true);
      }
  };

  const finishTutorial = () => {
      setShowBlockGuide(false);
      setIsTutorialMode(false);
      setCurrentLevelIndex(0);
  };

  const toggleMusic = () => {
    if (bgmRef.current) {
        if (isMusicPlaying) bgmRef.current.pause();
        else bgmRef.current.play().catch(() => {});
        setIsMusicPlaying(!isMusicPlaying);
    }
  };

  // Progressive Guide Trigger
  useEffect(() => {
      if (isTutorialMode || showLanding) return;
      
      const guidePoints = [0, 4, 14, 20, 25, 30, 35]; // Levels 1, 5, 15, 21, 26, 31, 36 (Index-1)
      if (guidePoints.includes(currentLevelIndex) && guideTriggeredLevel !== currentLevelIndex) {
          setTimeout(() => {
              setShowBlockGuide(true);
              setGuideTriggeredLevel(currentLevelIndex);
              
              let msg = "";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 0) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกพื้นฐานครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 4) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกทำซ้ำ ช่วยให้เขียนโค้ดสั้นลงครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 14) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเติมน้ำมันครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 20) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเจาะหินและวนซ้ำตลอดครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 25) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกรดน้ำดับไฟครับ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 30) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเงื่อนไข ถ้าเจอหิน ให้เจาะ";
              if (currentLevelIndex === 35) msg = "แนะนำบล็อกเงื่อนไขแบบเลือกทำ ถ้าเจอเอเลี่ยนให้ยิง";
              speak(msg);
          }, 1000);
      } else {
          // Auto-speak level intro if not showing guide
          if (!showBlockGuide) {
             const timer = setTimeout(() => speak(activeLevel.title + ". " + activeLevel.description), 800);
             return () => clearTimeout(timer);
          }
      }
  }, [currentLevelIndex, isTutorialMode, showLanding]);

  // Reset Level
  useEffect(() => { resetLevel(); }, [currentLevelIndex, isTutorialMode]);

  const resetLevel = () => {
    timeoutsRef.current.forEach(clearTimeout);
    timeoutsRef.current = [];
    setGameState({
      characterPos: { ...activeLevel.startPos }, characterDir: activeLevel.startDir,
      isCompleted: false, message: null, isRunning: false, visited: [],
      hasFuel: !!activeLevel.fuelPos, fuelCollected: false,
      destroyedRocks: [], extinguishedFires: [], defeatedAliens: []
    });
    setStepIndex(0);
    traceRef.current = [];
  };

  // --- SIMULATION ENGINE ---
  const runSimulation = () => {
      let simState = {
          pos: { ...activeLevel.startPos },
          dir: activeLevel.startDir,
          fuelCollected: false,
          rocks: [...activeLevel.rocks],
          fires: [...activeLevel.fires],
          aliens: [...activeLevel.aliens],
          msgs: [] as string[]
      };

      const trace: GameState[] = [];
      const MAX_STEPS = 100;
      let steps = 0;
      let crashMsg = null;

      const api = {
          move: () => {
              if (steps++ > MAX_STEPS || crashMsg) return;
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const next = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              
              if (next.x < 0 || next.x >= activeLevel.gridSize || next.y < 0 || next.y >= activeLevel.gridSize) {
                  crashMsg = "ตกขอบโลก!"; return;
              }
              if (activeLevel.obstacles.some(o => o.x === next.x && o.y === next.y)) {
                  crashMsg = "ชนกำแพง!"; return;
              }
              if (simState.rocks.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "ชนหิน!"; return; }
              if (simState.fires.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "โดนไฟคลอก!"; return; }
              if (simState.aliens.some(r => r.x === next.x && r.y === next.y)) { crashMsg = "โดนเอเลี่ยนจับ!"; return; }

              simState.pos = next;
              recordState(null);
          },
          turnLeft: () => { simState.dir = (simState.dir + 3) % 4; recordState(null); },
          turnRight: () => { simState.dir = (simState.dir + 1) % 4; recordState(null); },
          collect: () => {
               if (activeLevel.fuelPos && simState.pos.x === activeLevel.fuelPos.x && simState.pos.y === activeLevel.fuelPos.y) {
                   simState.fuelCollected = true;
                   recordState("เติมน้ำมันแล้ว!");
               } else {
                   recordState("ไม่มีอะไรให้เติม");
               }
          },
          drill: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.rocks.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.rocks.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("เจาะหินแตกละเอียด!");
              } else {
                  recordState("เจาะลมทำไม?");
              }
          },
          water: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.fires.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.fires.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("ดับไฟสำเร็จ!");
              } else {
                  recordState("ฉีดน้ำเล่น?");
              }
          },
          shoot: () => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              const idx = simState.aliens.findIndex(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (idx !== -1) {
                  simState.aliens.splice(idx, 1);
                  recordState("ยิงเอเลี่ยนดับ!");
              } else {
                  recordState("ยิงฟรี?");
              }
          },
          check: (type: string) => {
              const vec = getDirVector(simState.dir);
              const target = { x: simState.pos.x + vec.x, y: simState.pos.y + vec.y };
              if (type === 'ROCK') return simState.rocks.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (type === 'FIRE') return simState.fires.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              if (type === 'ALIEN') return simState.aliens.some(r => r.x === target.x && r.y === target.y);
              return false;
          }
      };

      const recordState = (msg: string | null) => {
          trace.push({
              characterPos: { ...simState.pos },
              characterDir: simState.dir,
              isCompleted: false,
              message: msg,
              isRunning: true,
              visited: [], 
              hasFuel: !!activeLevel.fuelPos,
              fuelCollected: simState.fuelCollected,
              destroyedRocks: activeLevel.rocks.filter(r => !simState.rocks.includes(r)),
              extinguishedFires: activeLevel.fires.filter(f => !simState.fires.includes(f)),
              defeatedAliens: activeLevel.aliens.filter(a => !simState.aliens.includes(a))
          });
      };

      try {
          // eslint-disable-next-line no-new-func
          const runner = new Function('api', code);
          runner(api);
      } catch (e) { console.error("Runtime Error", e); }

      if (crashMsg) {
          trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: crashMsg, isRunning: false });
      } else {
          const last = trace.length > 0 ? trace[trace.length-1] : { characterPos: simState.pos };
          if (last.characterPos.x === activeLevel.goalPos.x && last.characterPos.y === activeLevel.goalPos.y) {
              if (activeLevel.fuelPos && !simState.fuelCollected) {
                   trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: "ถึงดาวแล้วแต่ลืมเติมน้ำมัน!", isRunning: false });
              } else {
                   trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], isCompleted: true, message: "สำเร็จ! เก่งมาก", isRunning: false });
              }
          } else {
               trace.push({ ...trace[trace.length-1], message: "ยังไม่ถึงเป้าหมาย", isRunning: false });
          }
      }

      return trace;
  };

  const getDirVector = (dir: Direction) => {
      if (dir === Direction.NORTH) return { x: 0, y: -1 };
      if (dir === Direction.EAST) return { x: 1, y: 0 };
      if (dir === Direction.SOUTH) return { x: 0, y: 1 };
      return { x: -1, y: 0 };
  };

  const handleRun = () => {
      if (!code.trim()) { speak("วางบล็อกก่อนนะครับ"); return; }
      resetLevel();
      const trace = runSimulation();
      traceRef.current = trace;
      setGameState(prev => ({ ...prev, isRunning: true }));
      playTrace(trace);
  };

  const playTrace = (trace: GameState[]) => {
      trace.forEach((state, i) => {
          const id = setTimeout(() => {
              setGameState(prev => ({
                  ...state,
                  visited: [...prev.visited, state.characterPos] 
              }));
              setStepIndex(i + 1);
              
              if (state.message) speak(state.message);
              if (state.isCompleted && !isTutorialMode) {
                   if (!completedLevels.includes(activeLevel.id)) setCompletedLevels(p => [...p, activeLevel.id]);
                   if (activeLevel.id === LEVELS.length) setTimeout(() => setShowCertificate(true), 1500);
              }
          }, i * 600);
          timeoutsRef.current.push(id);
      });
  };

  // --- UI COMPONENTS ---

  const BlockGuideModal = () => {
      if (!showBlockGuide) return null;
      let guides = [];
      if (currentLevelIndex < 4) {
          guides = [
              { icon: "🚩", label: "เริ่มต้น", desc: "จุดเริ่ม" },
              { icon: "➡️", label: "เดินหน้า", desc: "เดิน 1 ช่อง" },
              { icon: "↩️", label: "เลี้ยวซ้าย", desc: "หมุนซ้าย" },
              { icon: "↪️", label: "เลี้ยวขวา", desc: "หมุนขวา" }
          ];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 14) {
          guides = [{ icon: "🔄", label: "ทำซ้ำ", desc: "ทำคำสั่งข้างในหลายรอบ" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 20) {
          guides = [{ icon: "⛽", label: "เติมน้ำมัน", desc: "เก็บน้ำมัน" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 25) {
          guides = [
              { icon: "♾️", label: "วนซ้ำตลอด", desc: "ทำไปเรื่อยๆ จนจบ" },
              { icon: "⛏️", label: "เจาะหิน", desc: "ทำลายหินข้างหน้า" }
          ];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 30) {
          guides = [{ icon: "💧", label: "รดน้ำ", desc: "ดับไฟข้างหน้า" }];
      } else if (currentLevelIndex < 35) {
          guides = [{ icon: "❓", label: "ถ้าเจอ...", desc: "ถ้าเจอสิ่งกีดขวาง ให้ทำ..." }];
      } else {
          guides = [
              { icon: "❓", label: "ถ้า...มิฉะนั้น", desc: "ทางเลือกสองทาง" },
              { icon: "🔫", label: "ยิงปืน", desc: "กำจัดเอเลี่ยน" }
          ];
      }

      return (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[80] bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-4xl w-full border-4 border-indigo-500 relative text-center">
                  <h2 className="text-3xl font-black text-indigo-800 mb-6">คู่มือบล็อกใหม่</h2>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-8">
                      {guides.map((g, i) => (
                          <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-4 bg-slate-50 p-4 rounded-xl border">
                              <div className="text-4xl">{g.icon}</div>
                              <div className="text-left">
                                  <div className="font-black text-lg text-indigo-700">{g.label}</div>
                                  <div className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{g.desc}</div>
                              </div>
                          </div>
                      ))}
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={() => setShowBlockGuide(false)} className="px-10 py-4 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full text-2xl font-bold shadow-xl">
                      เข้าใจแล้ว
                  </button>
              </div>
          </div>
      );
  };

  const TutorialOverlay = () => {
      if (!isTutorialMode || showBlockGuide) return null;
      const steps = [
          { text: "Block Coding คือการสั่งงานคอมพิวเตอร์ด้วยการต่อบล็อกเหมือนเลโก้" },
          { text: "โจทย์อยู่ทางซ้าย", position: "left-10 top-1/2" },
          { text: "ลากบล็อกมาวางตรงกลาง", position: "top-1/3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" },
          { text: "กดปุ่มเล่นเพื่อรันคำสั่ง", position: "bottom-24 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" },
          { text: "หุ่นยนต์จะเดินในช่องทางขวา", position: "right-10 top-1/2" }
      ];
      
      const currentStep = steps[tutorialStep];
      // SAFETY CHECK: Prevent white screen by returning null if step doesn't exist
      if (!currentStep) return null;

      return (
          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-black/70 flex flex-col">
             <div className={`absolute bg-white p-6 rounded-3xl border-4 border-yellow-400 max-w-xl w-[90%] z-[70] text-center ${currentStep.position || 'top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2'}`}>
                 <p className="text-xl font-bold mb-6">{currentStep.text}</p>
                 <button onClick={nextTutorialStep} className="px-8 py-3 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full font-bold mx-auto flex items-center gap-2">
                     <CheckCircle2 /> {tutorialStep === 0 ? 'เริ่มเลย' : 'ต่อไป'}
                 </button>
             </div>
          </div>
      );
  };

  // --- RENDER ---
  if (showLanding) return (
      <div className="h-screen w-full bg-code-pattern flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 relative overflow-hidden text-white">
          <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-code-overlay pointer-events-none"></div>
          <div className="relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center animate-in zoom-in duration-500 text-center">
              <div className="bg-cyan-500/20 p-6 rounded-full mb-8 border border-cyan-400 animate-bounce">
                  <Bot size={100} className="text-cyan-400" />
              </div>
              <h1 className="text-7xl font-black text-cyan-400 mb-4 font-tech tracking-wider">CODE CRAFT</h1>
              <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-slate-300 mb-12 font-tech">< บทเรียน Block Coding /></h2>
              <button onClick={handleStart} className="px-12 py-6 bg-green-500 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-all">
                  <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-white flex items-center gap-3"><Play fill="currentColor" /> เริ่มเรียนรู้</span>
              </button>
              <div className="mt-16 text-slate-400">
                  <p className="text-xl font-bold text-white">นายธนิท ธนพัตนิรัชกุล</p>
                  <p>ตำแหน่งครู โรงเรียนกาฬสินธุ์ปัญญานุกูล จังหวัดกาฬสินธุ์</p>
              </div>
          </div>
      </div>
  );

  if (showCertificate) return (
      <div className="h-screen w-full bg-indigo-900/90 flex items-center justify-center p-4 z-50 fixed inset-0">
         <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-10 text-center border-8 border-yellow-400 shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in">
             <Award className="w-32 h-32 text-yellow-400 mx-auto mb-6 animate-bounce" fill="currentColor" />
             <h1 className="text-5xl font-black text-indigo-800 mb-6">ยินดีด้วย!</h1>
             <p className="text-3xl text-gray-700 font-bold mb-8">คุณคือ Code Craft Master!</p>
             <button onClick={() => { setShowCertificate(false); setShowLanding(true); setCurrentLevelIndex(0); }} className="px-8 py-4 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2 mx-auto">
                <Home /> กลับหน้าแรก
             </button>
         </div>
      </div>
  );

  return (
    <div className="h-screen flex flex-col bg-slate-50 font-sans relative">
      <TutorialOverlay />
      <BlockGuideModal />

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="h-16 bg-white border-b flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-20">
          <button onClick={() => setShowLanding(true)} className="text-indigo-600"><Home size={28} /></button>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2"><Bot className="text-indigo-600" /><span className="text-3xl font-black text-indigo-800 font-tech">Code Craft</span></div>
          <button onClick={toggleMusic} className="text-indigo-600">{isMusicPlaying ? <Music size={24} /> : <Music4 size={24} />}</button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden relative">
        {/* Left Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-3/12 flex flex-col border-r bg-white p-4 ${tutorialStep === 1 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
               <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(Math.max(0, currentLevelIndex - 1))} disabled={isTutorialMode || currentLevelIndex===0}><ChevronLeft size={32} /></button>
               <span className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-800">{isTutorialMode ? 'Demo' : `${activeLevel.id}/40`}</span>
               <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(Math.min(LEVELS.length - 1, currentLevelIndex + 1))} disabled={isTutorialMode || currentLevelIndex===LEVELS.length-1}><ChevronRight size={32} /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-yellow-50 p-6 rounded-3xl border-2 border-yellow-200 relative mb-4">
                <button onClick={() => speak(activeLevel.title + ". " + activeLevel.description)} className="absolute top-3 right-3 text-yellow-500"><Volume2 /></button>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-indigo-900 mb-2">{activeLevel.title}</h2>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-700 font-medium">{activeLevel.description}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-2xl border border-blue-100">
                <p className="text-lg text-blue-800 font-bold">💡 คำใบ้: {activeLevel.hint}</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        {/* Center Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-5/12 flex flex-col relative bg-slate-100 ${tutorialStep === 2 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex-1 relative">
                <BlocklyComponent 
                    key={isTutorialMode ? 'tutorial' : currentLevelIndex}
                    initialXml={`<xml><block type="kru_start" x="40" y="40"></block></xml>`}
                    toolbox={activeLevel.allowedBlocks}
                    onCodeChange={setCode}
                    onBlockCountChange={setBlockCount}
                />
            </div>
            <div className={`p-4 bg-white border-t flex justify-between shadow-xl z-20 ${tutorialStep === 3 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
                <button onClick={resetLevel} className="flex flex-col items-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500"><RotateCcw /><span className="text-xs">เริ่มใหม่</span></button>
                <button onClick={handleRun} disabled={gameState.isRunning} className="flex items-center gap-3 px-8 py-3 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 disabled:bg-gray-300">
                    <Play size={28} fill="currentColor" /><span className="text-xl font-black">เล่น</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right Panel */}
        <div className={`w-full md:w-4/12 bg-white flex flex-col p-6 border-l relative ${tutorialStep === 4 ? 'z-50 ring-4 ring-yellow-400' : ''}`}>
            <Stage level={activeLevel} gameState={gameState} />
            {gameState.isCompleted && !isTutorialMode && (
                <div className="mt-6 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom">
                    <button onClick={() => setCurrentLevelIndex(currentLevelIndex + 1)} className="w-full py-5 bg-indigo-600 text-white text-2xl font-black rounded-2xl shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                        ไปบทถัดไป <ChevronRight strokeWidth={4} />
                    </button>
                </div>
            )}
            {gameState.isCompleted && isTutorialMode && (
                <div className="mt-6"><button onClick={nextTutorialStep} className="w-full py-5 bg-green-500 text-white text-2xl font-black rounded-2xl">เข้าใจแล้ว</button></div>
            )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default App;

The goal is to avoid breaking any existing imports, which is a priority for smooth integration.

I will update the application to feature a **"Cool Robot"** design and change the background music to a **slower, chill track** at **25% volume**.

Here are the changes:

2.  **`App.tsx`**:
    *   Created a new `CoolRobotIcon` SVG component to replace the standard `Bot` icon.
    *   Updated the Landing Page and Header to use this new cool robot.
    *   Set the background music volume to `0.25`.
3.  **`components/Stage.tsx`**: Updated the robot character in the game grid to match the new "Cool Robot" design (wearing a visor/sunglasses).
